title: Debt wall on every door: feature-swap guard, lane-aware close, durable scribing ledger + orphan sweep
read_first: decision for scribing-integrity D1-D3 (bee decisions search --text scribing-integrity)
action: Per scribing-integrity D1-D3. Twins byte-identical everywhere. (1) cells.mjs: scribingDebt(root, opts) gains optional {feature, sinceTs} overrides (default behavior unchanged); NEW globalScribingDebt(root): for every LIVE capped behavior_change cell, resolve its feature's best sync stamp as max of (a) ledger .bee/logs/scribing-runs.jsonl entries for that feature, (b) that feature's lane record last_scribing_run, (c) default state.last_scribing_run when its feature matches; the cell is orphaned debt when capped_at > stamp or no stamp exists; return {count, features:[{feature, cells}]} sorted stable. (2) state scribing-run: after updating state, append one JSON line {ts, feature, areas} to .bee/logs/scribing-runs.jsonl (mkdir recursive; an append failure is a LOUD stderr warning naming the ledger, command still succeeds — the state stamp stays authoritative for the active feature); the verb accepts stamping a feature that is not the currently-active one (state field only updates when it matches; the ledger line is always written) so orphaned features can be repaired. (3) state set guard (default record only): when --feature names a DIFFERENT feature than the current one and scribingDebt for the CURRENT feature > 0, refuse with the same message shape as closeGuardScribingDebt, honoring --waive-scribing-debt with the same logged waiver decision. (4) lane close guard: state set --lane X --phase compounding-complete computes debt for the LANE record's feature with that lane's last_scribing_run as threshold (via the new opts) and applies the same wall + waiver. (5) status --json: scribing_debt gains an orphaned block {count, features} from globalScribingDebt; inject.mjs preamble prints ONE loud line when orphaned count > 0 (mirror the capture-queue line style). Registry: state.set declares waive-scribing-debt boolean if not already declared; status output changes are additive. (6) Tests red-first and SCOPED per doctrine: feature-swap refusal + waive path; lane close refusal + waive; globalScribingDebt fixture (a capped behavior_change cell for a non-active feature with no stamp -> counted; stamped via ledger -> cleared); scribing-run appends a parseable ledger line and allows non-active feature stamping; status payload carries orphaned block. Then regen: onboard --apply, render_plugin, release_manifest --write, impact_registry --write.

truths: feature swap over unpaid debt refuses; --waive-scribing-debt logs the waiver
lane close checks the lane feature's own debt
scribing-run writes the ledger line and can stamp a non-active feature
orphan sweep counts live capped behavior_change cells with no post-cap stamp
status carries the orphaned block; preamble prints one loud line when non-zero
regen complete: ledger parity, release manifest, impact registry green

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_cli_state.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_misc.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Debt wall now stands at every door a feature can leave through unfinished: feature swap, lane close, and a durable scribing ledger that lets globalScribingDebt sweep orphaned features (dead sessions) invisible to every prior surface.
